name: git-workflow branch-off recommendation triggers when commit count exceeds the configured threshold
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m one && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m two && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q --allow-empty -m three) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/git-workflow/recommend.sh" --root repo --check branch-off --commit-threshold 2 2>out.txt && grep -q 'recommendation=branch-off' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=commit-threshold-exceeded' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
